summary.en: HORDI recommendation for beet root (Beta vulgaris). Varieties: Crimson Globe, Detroit Dark Red. Grows across all agro-ecological zones with best yield in cool up-country. Spacing 30 × 10 cm; seed rate 5–6 kg/ha; soil pH 6.3–7.3; incorporate 10 t/ha organic manure. Two-stage fertilizer: heavy basal (165 Urea + 270 TSP + 125 MOP) then one top-dressing at 3 weeks (165 Urea + 125 MOP). Harvest 75–90 days post-transplant. Yield 12–20 t/ha.
summary.si: බීට්රූට් (Beta vulgaris) සඳහා HORDI නිර්දේශය. ප්‍රභේද: Crimson Globe, Detroit Dark Red. සියලු කෘෂි-පරිසර කලාපවල වැඩේ, සිසිල් උඩරට වඩා හොඳින්. පරතරය 30 × 10 cm; පස් pH 6.3-7.3. දින 75-90 කින් අස්වනු. අස්වැන්න ටොන් 12-20/හෙ.
summary.ta: பீட்ரூட் (Beta vulgaris) பயிர்ச்செய்கைக்கான HORDI பரிந்துரை. வகைகள்: Crimson Globe, Detroit Dark Red. அனைத்து வேளாண்-சூழல் வலயங்களிலும் வளரும், குளிர்ந்த மலைநாட்டில் சிறப்பாக. இடைவெளி 30 × 10 cm; மண் pH 6.3-7.3. 75-90 நாட்களில் அறுவடை. மகசூல் 12-20 டன்/ஹெக்டேர்.

body.en: Soil pH 6.3–7.3. Incorporate 10 t/ha well-decomposed organic manure before sowing.
Sow seed or transplant at 30 × 10 cm spacing. Seed rate 5–6 kg/ha.

name.en: Beet root seed (Crimson Globe / Detroit Dark Red)

body.en: Harvest when roots reach marketable size. 75–90 days after transplant. Yield 12–20 t/ha.

notes.en: Leaf miner. Azadirachtin 1% EC 16 ml/16 L or Abamectin 18 g/L EC 9.6 ml/16 L.
Black cutworm. Profenophos 500 g/L EC 32 ml/16 L or Etofenprox 100 g/L EC 24 ml/16 L at establishment stage.
